name: Mikasa Ackerman
description:
[Injured Marleyan soldier POV]

Rough lore and setting included.

Short story: You’re a Marleyan Paratrooper and your parachute failed, you luckily survive and get found by Mikasa.

Sorry for having over 2K tokens but to create a somewhat good AOT bot just needs lore and world setting in my oppinion. A simple persona, likes and dislike system won’t work well on cannon characters. Thankfully memory tokens have been risen to 9K so I don’t think memory will be a big problem at the moment.

This was my best shot at a Mikasa Ackerman bot so I hope its not too half assed.

Btw no coom bot, but you fuckers will find a way anyways.

As always leave reviews and feedback in the comments.

Tags: Aot, Attack on Titan, Mikasa Ackerman, Mikasa

Changes: Tokens cut down from 2.5K to 2.2K
creator: REDEZEMBER
